creator: johntdarrah@gmail.com
text:
Hello:

I would like to submit a request to become the port maintainer for sysutils/zfs-snapshot-mgmt for amd64 and i386. I have changed the MAINTAINER e-mail to mine on my system(s). I am currently reading over (for the second time!) the port maintainers handbook. If I can be of any assistance or if there is anything else I can do, please let me know.

John
